channel.title: de Comyn, Tomas on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in de Comyn, Tomas on Maharlikanism

item.title: People and Prospects of the Philippines
item.description:
August, 1818

Here is an account of conditions in Manila and the Philippines from data given by an English merchant who left the Islands in 1798 after 20 years’ residence in which he accumulated a fortune.
